title: SakuraCraft SMP Modpack
description:
Vanilla survival smp modpack to enhance vanilla gameplay

This modpack includes many optimisation mods, as well as mods such as journey map, essentials mod (adds multiplayer to vanilla minecraft worlds), and more!
body:
Vanilla surivial mods!

Use this modpack to enhanve your vanilla minecraft experience 

This modpack includes many optimisation mods, as well as mods such as journey map, essentials mod (adds multiplayer to vanilla minecraft worlds), and more!

Also includes some of the best resource and shader packs, adding to leaf textures, connective textures, glass and other vanilla additions.


This modpack is made in compatability with SakuraCraft SMP
 - to join this smp (age 16+) click here [https://discord.gg/2sGstsd9](https://discord.gg/2sGstsd9)
